title: Restore Posekit 3D-to-OpenPose split-view generation
operator_request: Posekit/OpenRepose takes an image, renders a live 3D figure and OpenPose split view, rotates 360 degrees, rerenders OpenPose, and exports ComfyUI-ready OpenPose images.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Inspect current Rust Atelier pose modules before adding rendering. Use existing 3D/render primitives where present.

scope.summary: Make Posekit a sibling Atelier tab that can generate, preview, rotate, and export OpenPose from a native split view.
base_scope: Render a Posekit split view with 3D source/figure preview and OpenPose preview.
Support 360-degree rotation controls and rerender OpenPose output.
Export ComfyUI-ready OpenPose images with receipts.
Expose stable Argus IDs for viewport, controls, export, and status.
Update internal UserManual with Posekit generation/export workflow.
acceptance_criteria: Posekit tab opens next to CKC and Ingest.
The split view is nonblank and Argus-inspectable.
Rotation changes the exported OpenPose orientation or recorded pose state.
Export produces a ComfyUI-ready artifact with traceable metadata.
verification: Native UI tests for Posekit split view and controls.
